# BundleHive

> A framework for building standalone, embeddable React components. Write a React
> component; get a self-contained bundle that mounts onto any website as a
> Shadow-DOM custom element with isolated CSS (Tailwind v4 included). Client-render
> only — no SSR, no routing. It is a bundler + thin runtime, not a meta-framework.

BundleHive produces the standard third-party embed: a custom element plus an async
CDN script (`<my-widget></my-widget>` + `<script src="…/embed.js" async>`). Authors
write plain React; the framework owns Shadow-DOM mounting, CSS isolation, the Vite
build, and runtime config.

## Quickstart

A widget package needs five files, then `bundlehive build`:

1. `package.json` — deps `@usereq/bundlehive` + react/react-dom; dev `@usereq/bundlehive-cli`
   + tailwindcss; scripts `"dev": "bundlehive dev"`, `"build": "bundlehive build --name X"`;
   CDN fields `unpkg`/`jsdelivr`/`browser`/`main` → `./dist/embed.js`.
2. `tsconfig.json` — `"jsx": "react-jsx"`, `lib` includes `DOM`.
3. `src/styles.css` — `@import "tailwindcss";`
4. `src/vite-env.d.ts` — `declare module "*.css?inline" { const css: string; export default css; }`
5. `src/widget.tsx` (the React component) + `src/embed.ts` (calls `defineWidget`).

```ts
// src/embed.ts — importing this registers the element
import { defineWidget } from "@usereq/bundlehive";
import styles from "./styles.css?inline";
import { Widget } from "./widget";
export default defineWidget(Widget, { tag: "acme-widget", styles, observedAttributes: ["title"] });
```

```html
<!-- what a customer pastes -->
<acme-widget title="Hi"></acme-widget>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/@acme/widget" async></script>
```

## API surface (`@usereq/bundlehive`)

- `defineWidget(Component, { tag, styles, observedAttributes, parseConfig, strictMode, autoMount })` → `{ tag, elementClass, mount }`
- `useWidget<Config>()` → `{ config, element, shadowRoot }` (re-renders on config change)
- `useWidgetCommands(cmd => …)` — imperative commands (`open`/`close`/…) from the loader
- `<Portal>` — shadow-root-scoped overlays (dialogs/popovers); plain `createPortal` drops events across shadow boundaries
- `createLoader(name, definition, { target? })` — install a command-queue global
- `onDomReady(fn)` — DOM-ready guard
- CLI `bundlehive dev|build` — flags `--name --entry --external --outDir --port`
- `@usereq/bundlehive-build` `widgetBuildConfig(opts)` — the Vite preset, if you prefer a `vite.config.ts`

## Three embed modes

- **Placed element** — customer drops a tag + script; config via string attributes.
- **Auto-inject** — `autoMount: true`; customer pastes only the script; the widget injects itself (floating launcher).
- **Command-queue loader** — `createLoader(...)`; customer pastes an inline stub + script and calls a JS API (rich config + `open`/`close`) even before the bundle loads (Intercom/Segment pattern).

## Critical gotchas

- **Tailwind v4 in shadow DOM is auto-fixed** by the runtime (it hoists `@property`
  rules and rewrites `:root`→`:host`). Just `@import "tailwindcss"` and import it
  `?inline`. Never inject a global Tailwind `<link>` — it leaks into the host page.
- **Vite 8 is rolldown/oxc-based** — never set `esbuild: {}` or `minify: 'esbuild'`;
  it forces the deprecated esbuild path and fails. JSX comes from tsconfig.
- **Config is runtime, not build-time** — pass via attributes / loader so one bundle
  serves every tenant and environment.
- **Custom-element tags need a hyphen** (`acme-widget`, not `widget`).
- **Import widget CSS with `?inline`** — a bare CSS import injects into the document, not the shadow root.
- **Shadow DOM isolates CSS, not JS** — not a security boundary; no secrets in the bundle.
- **No SSR** — client render only, by design.

## Docs and source

- Agent skill (step-by-step authoring): `.claude/skills/bundlehive-widget/SKILL.md`
- Full API reference: `.claude/skills/bundlehive-widget/references/api.md`
- Embed modes with examples: `.claude/skills/bundlehive-widget/references/embed-modes.md`
- Publishing to npm/CDN: `.claude/skills/bundlehive-widget/references/publishing.md`
- Design/scope/roadmap: `docs/PLAN.md`
- Runtime source: `packages/react/src/` (`define-widget.tsx`, `css-isolation.ts`, `loader.ts`)
- Working examples: `examples/counter`, `examples/floating-badge`, `examples/loader-chat`
